name: Dr. Yusuf & Amina Okonkwo

statedReqs.notes: Selling the downtown loft; twins on the way. Deadline is biological and non-negotiable.

hiddenPrefs.desc: They've already bought in Maple Terrace with a bridge loan — every week unsold costs them real money, more than they've admitted.

intro: Organized to a fault, nesting at industrial scale. Amina has staged the loft herself. It shows. Beautifully.
